from sqlalchemy.orm import Session
from sqlalchemy import select
from models import Order, OrderItem


def calculate_user_totals(session: Session, user_ids: list[int]) -> dict[int, float]:
    totals = {}
    for user_id in user_ids:
        orders = session.execute(
            select(Order).where(Order.user_id == user_id)
        ).scalars().all()
        total = sum(o.total for o in orders)
        totals[user_id] = total
    return totals


def get_order_item_counts(session: Session, order_ids: list[int]) -> dict[int, int]:
    counts = {}
    for order_id in order_ids:
        items = session.execute(
            select(OrderItem).where(OrderItem.order_id == order_id)
        ).scalars().all()
        counts[order_id] = len(items)
    return counts


def find_recent_orders_per_user(session: Session, user_ids: list[int]) -> dict[int, dict]:
    result = {}
    for user_id in user_ids:
        order = session.execute(
            select(Order).where(Order.user_id == user_id).order_by(Order.created_at.desc()).limit(1)
        ).scalar_one_or_none()
        if order:
            result[user_id] = {"id": order.id, "total": order.total}
    return result
